The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Dumfries and Galloway, Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole meet Alan, who works in the forestry business. Henry decides to give four bar stools a bright makeover, while Simon transforms two old sheep shearer seats into an extraordinary bench

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: A derelict building in a French village gets a new lease of life. Meanwhile, in Portugal, a couple dip their toes into their first season as holiday hosts, and in southern France, a very special event takes place in a refurbished chapel

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with John Thomson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Penny from Staffordshire searches for a new home where she can run her business in Malaga. Laura Hamilton lines up five great options for her budget of £120,000

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, Claire heads to a local garden centre to kit out her floating greenhouse. Paul rediscovers his artistic side, and his towpath pop-up at Fradley Junction proves a runaway success. Continuous cruiser Jay reaches Stoke-on-Trent just in time for his stand-up comedy performance, but not before a huge canal breach diverts his journey. And will the River Canal Rescue team finally manage to lift the burnt-out boat to safety?

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château de la Boutinière, after five years of hard work, this once-abandoned and graffiti-covered shell prepares to host its biggest ever wedding. But with just days to go, Alison and Zion race to get every final detail right. In the Loire Valley, at Château de la Croix Boisée, Vivienne and Simon strike up the overture for a retirement party worthy of Vivienne's opera-singing mother, but their terrace is still far from centre stage. And in Normandy, Xavier and Tasha finally get the keys to their dream home

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, Sharon and Steve Garner juggle competing priorities as they search for a Spanish 'forever home' for golf-mad Graham and his wife Tracy, with a top budget of 230,000 euros. On the Costa Blanca, the Aldertons are armed with a whopping 1.3 million euros to find a home for Joanne who, after five years of renting locally, is finally ready to put down roots

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.sub-title: Will My Summer Holiday Be Cancelled?
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the uncertainty over summer holidays, ever since the Iran War sent jet fuel prices soaring and caused thousands of flights to be cancelled. She finds out whether foreign holidays are now out of the question or if the opposite is true, with bargains to be had. She also explores whether holidaying in the UK could be a smarter alternative.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, including the likes of Vernon Kay and Paddy McGuinness, Denise Van Outen and Johnny Vaughan, Vicky Pattison and Pete Wicks, Bez and Shaun Ryder, Ashley Banjo and Perri Kiely, Rylan and mum Linda, and Roman and Martin Kemp sit down to give their sharp, insightful and funny thoughts on the week's TV

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A hairdresser and a builder show that age is just a number. A hip-hop artist meets a musician looking for love off stage. Two 19-year-olds take their first dating steps together and a weightlifter and a bodybuilder weigh up their options

programme.title: BlackBerry (2023)
programme.desc: In 1996, engineering student Mike Lazaridis and best friend Douglas Fregin stand on the precipice of creating the world's first smartphone. However, a series of disastrous events paves the way for the gadget's eventual demise. Comedy, starring Jay Baruchel, Glenn Howerton and Matt Johnson

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The penultimate edition sees four of the contestants in with a realistic chance of becoming the 21st Taskmaster champion - while Joel Dommett is just having a really good time. Alex Horne is delighted to be put in charge of a flip-flop flinging machine, Amy Gledhill wrings out a poached egg, Kumail Nanjiani tries planking and Armando Iannucci shows why it's important not to curtail his nap time

programme.title: The Lighthouse (2019)
programme.desc: In the late 19th century, Ephraim Winslow is hired to work for a month on an isolated island off the coast of New England, under the supervision of an irritable old man named Thomas Wake. Winslow tries to stay sane as Wake assigns him a series of arduous tasks, but that seems to be the toughest job of all. Co-writer/director Robert Eggers' psychological thriller, starring Robert Pattinson and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the King's Head in Addlethorpe, Lincolnshire, where landlady Helen Coy and her bar manager and best friend Emma Green are pulling out all the stops to win. The B&B owners are taken back to their childhood at the funfair, At dinner, B&B beginners Louise and Andy Macbeth rattle nerves when Louise reveals her past career as a hospitality journalist - leaving pub veteran Helen less than impressed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: B&B newcomers Andy and Louise Macbeth invite their rival hoteliers to spend the night at the dog-friendly Beck Hall in North Yorkshire, where an extra-critical Helen and Emma discover what they believe to be stray dog hairs in their bed. A fishing trip makes Terri feel a little out of sorts, and when the time arrives for feedback, the managers are surprised to learn two of their guests have indicated they would not come back for a second stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Albaston in Torquay for the third day of the competition, where they are welcomed by owners and avid souvenir collectors, Kevin and Julie Shadbolt. Terri and Stuart are impressed by their room, but are startled by the memorabilia in the communal lounge, and expectations are raised at dinner when Kevin reveals he has a secret recipe for success when it comes to breakfast. However, at feedback the next day, tensions begin to rise

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay of the week is in Bournemouth, at Terri and Stewart's specialist dance holiday venue the Hotel Piccadilly, where a class in the grand ballroom soon has the guests in a spin. However, temperatures rise over dinner when the simmering tension between Louise and Helen finally boils over

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet up for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. King's Head landlady Helen challenges Louise and Andy about the problems they reported on cleanliness in the bathroom. while Louise and Andy from Beck Hall get hot under the collar when the others criticise their dog-friendly approach

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: A new employee entertains everyone with his impersonations - usurping Doug's role as the office clown. American comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug fakes a heart attack to stop Carrie getting angry after he forgets her friend's name. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug tries to find his father at a model-train convention - but instead finds his mother with a highly flirtatious Arthur. American comedy, starring Kevin James and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie decide to find new friends in an attempt to annoy Deacon and his wife, but find it is harder than it looks

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is elated to be signed up by a modelling agency, convinced fame and wealth are just around the corner - but his dreams of success prove short-lived. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A stranger reveals to the Barones that Frank used to be his mentor - much to the bemusement of Ray and Robert, who find it hard to believe their father could ever have inspired anyone. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert and Ray end up with the mother of all guilt trips when they decide not to help Marie with a home project so they can land a prime spot on the golf course

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz helps Frasier arrange a date between her mother and Martin, unaware they detest each other. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Show Where Woody Shows Up
programme.desc: Woody pays Frasier a surprise visit and the friends become nostalgic about old times in a certain Boston bar. With a guest appearance by Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: An episode consisting of three Valentine's Day stories. Frasier takes his station manager to dinner, but cannot work out whether she has a personal or professional interest in him. Niles' plans for a romantic evening are dashed, while Martin and Daphne commiserate with each other in their loneliness. Guest starring Virginia Madsen (Sideways)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles hires a new lawyer to represent him in his divorce case when Maris tries to postpone the settlement. However, the attorney warns him that his unrequited passion for Daphne could harm his chances in court - and so could Frasier's inability to lie

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty learns he has a long-lost daughter, but ruins any chances of a happy family life by gambling away her most prized possession in a high-stakes poker game. Featuring the guest voices of Drew Barrymore, John Updike, Amy Tam and Stephen King

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa joins an environmental protection group and begins campaigning in a last-ditch attempt to prevent the city's oldest redwood tree being felled by a rich Texan. With the voice of Joshua Jackson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer stages a revolt against moves to give Springfield a new telephone dialling code, stirring up public indignation and splitting the town down the middle. Featuring the guest voices of the Who and Gary Coleman

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week kicks off at 38 St Giles in Norwich, where guests enjoy a historic afternoon at the city's cathedral, and breakfast is a roaring success for everyone but one

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Harry and Sarah hope to wow their guests with their recently renovated pub The Royal Oak in Hawkhurst, Kent. Unfortunately, the style doesn't match one B&Ber's standards. After an afternoon on the beers at a microbrewery, moods are high but some pernickety furniture feedback brings Harry and Sarah back down to earth with a bump

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers head to Tiddington in Oxfordshire for the week's third visit, where Dawn hosts at her country pub, The Fox & Goat. The facilities seem to be flawless, leaving one guest determined to find some faulty furniture. There's another historic afternoon out, this time with a tour around Blenheim Palace. All that walking should have the B&Bers knackered and ready for bed - so why does one of them have such a restless night?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to No 64 at The Joiners in West Malling, Kent. Host Ollie hopes that his French-styled B&B will have that 'je-ne-sais-quoi' to win the competition. The guests monkey around at a zoo in the afternoon before things get heated in the kitchen the next morning. The heat rises even further when Ollie sees his breakfast scores

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's payment day, and after an epic battle all week, the contenders meet up one final time to find out which boutique B&B has triumphed

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Northern Ireland where Jennifer has hit a wall climbing the property ladder after selling her semi-detached starter home in Belfast and Tony and Val are looking to relocate from London to County Down

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The 1966 World Cup Final - In Colour
programme.desc: England v West Germany. To raise awareness about Alzheimer's disease, David Baddiel introduces a full-colour restoration of the iconic showpiece match at Wembley Stadium. Alf Ramsey's hosts were looking to lift the trophy for the first time, but faced a tough test against the West Germans, and the match would go to extra time, with six goals being scored. With contributions from Geoff Hurst, Harry Kane, Michael Owen and Jill Scott

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones is joined by David Coulthard, Mark Webber and Lawrence Barretto to present action from the battle for grid positions in the sixth round of the campaign, held at Circuit de Monaco. McLaren's Lando Norris took pole position here last year, with Charles Leclerc of Ferrari joining him at the front of the grid

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody (2018)
programme.desc: Freddie Mercury and Queen go from playing small venues to becoming one of the biggest rock bands in the world. While Freddie comes to terms with his sexuality, outside forces threaten to tear the group apart, until their defining moment at Live Aid in July 1985. Oscar-winning biopic, starring Rami Malek, Lucy Boynton and Gwilym Lee

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics gather in front of their TVs once more to give their thoughts on the week's programming. Shows subjected to their scrutiny include The Great British Bake Off, Coronation Street, Educating Yorkshire, The Inheritance, Stranded on Honeymoon Island, The Guest, The Dog House and BBC News coverage of Donald Trump's tariffs

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: A pair of teenage schoolgirls ask Sam and his crew to make a movie about their favourite teacher, Miss Stanthorpe, who never got a chance to go to her own prom. The headmaster backs the project in a bid to look cool, hapless Sebastian spills food on his top - reverting to his childlike self and rejoining Year 8 - and the girls compete over who should play the young Miss Stanthorpe. Comedy from the mind of Sam Campbell, who stars alongside Lara Ricote, Aaron Chen and David Hargreaves

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Gurnsfield United are a bottom league team without a chance, but number one fan Ewin wants to see them win, if only on the big screen. Sam and the gang can't resist making such an innocent dream come true - only to find themselves being sued by an eccentric British writer for inadvertently stealing one of his characters

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty learns he has a long-lost daughter, but ruins any chances of a happy family life by gambling away her most prized possession in a high-stakes poker game. Featuring the guest voices of Drew Barrymore, John Updike, Amy Tam and Stephen King

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The penultimate edition sees four of the contestants in with a realistic chance of becoming the 21st Taskmaster champion - while Joel Dommett is just having a really good time. Alex Horne is delighted to be put in charge of a flip-flop flinging machine, Amy Gledhill wrings out a poached egg, Kumail Nanjiani tries planking and Armando Iannucci shows why it's important not to curtail his nap time

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: Leo suspects someone has been inside his house, and when he has dinner with his ex, Curtis, all his old fears rise up. Clive starts work on Leo's bar on Canal Street. But when he gets assistance from his son, Saul, who gets recognised, it sets into motion a series of events that lead to a shocking conclusion. Drama, starring Alan Cumming and David Morrissey

programme.title: Fire Island (2022)
programme.desc: A group of best friends gathers in Fire Island Pines for an annual week of love and laughter. However, a sudden change of events might make this their last summer in gay paradise. Comedy romance, starring Joel Kim Booster, Bowen Yang and Margaret Cho

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cumbria is the location for three more couples to demonstrate their cooking and hosting skills, kicking off with teachers Rory and Sam, who serve up dishes inspired by Europe. Day two sees Sarka and Paul lay on a Czech menu, but the massive portions defeat everyone - except the ever-hungry Rory. Finally, it's the turn of John and Sally with their retro 1980s evening. Which couple will win the cash prize of £1,000?

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Sarah and her family decide to build a thatched boathouse on their edge of their pond, taking inspiration from the historic boathouses down the River Thames. After completing the walls, the whole family pitch in to thatch the roof, before Graham adds a final flourish with carvings the boys made in their workshop. The boys also discover a novel way of cooking breakfast al fresco by making a Swedish torch from a log

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with John Thomson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier proves to be a complete disaster as a children's party clown and Sam falls for the daughter of a former girlfriend. American comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Bar Wars II - The Woodman Strikes Back
programme.desc: The day of the annual Boston Bloody Mary Competition dawns and Sam and the gang are determined to beat Gary's Old Town Tavern this time, even if it means cheating

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: An entrepreneur leaves his pet in Rebecca's apparently capable hands, but Sam jeopardises her job by letting the dog escape. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's parents draw attention to Robert's strange eating habits, making him feel self-conscious every time he sits down for a meal - so Debra devises a plan to cure him once and for all. Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An invitation to spend Easter with the Barones spurs the MacDougalls to unite with the family over a 500-piece jigsaw puzzle - until Ray and Pat upset the apple cart by indulging in more than their fair share of bonding. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is upset to hear Debra has been discussing intimate details of their marriage with her gossipy friends - and responds by revealing a few secrets of his own. Guest starring Maggie Wheeler (Friends)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Seal Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier prepare for a dinner party at Maris's beach house, but a bizarre turn of events results in them having to devote all their time to disposing of a dead seal that has washed up on the shore

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Unemployed Roz is reduced to borrowing money from Frasier, but he thinks she is spending it irresponsibly. Meanwhile, rumours circulate that KACL is rehiring staff. Comedy, starring Peri Gilpin and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A friendly woman comes to Frasier's rescue when he's out Christmas shopping. He offers to return the favour, but the last thing he expects is to end up on a blind date with her daughter - while pretending to be Jewish. Meanwhile, Niles takes part in a festive pageant

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A series of good deeds backfires, embroiling Frasier in a humiliating scandal and causing him to question his faith in human nature. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.desc: The B&Bers head to Tiddington in Oxfordshire for the week's third visit, where Dawn hosts at her country pub, The Fox & Goat. The facilities seem to be flawless, leaving one guest determined to find some faulty furniture. There's another historic afternoon out, this time with a tour around Blenheim Palace. All that walking should have the B&Bers knackered and ready for bed - so why does one of them have such a restless night?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to No 64 at The Joiners in West Malling, Kent. Host Ollie hopes that his French-styled B&B will have that 'je-ne-sais-quoi' to win the competition. The guests monkey around at a zoo in the afternoon before things get heated in the kitchen the next morning. The heat rises even further when Ollie sees his breakfast scores

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's payment day, and after an epic battle all week, the contenders meet up one final time to find out which boutique B&B has triumphed

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Northern Ireland where Jennifer has hit a wall climbing the property ladder after selling her semi-detached starter home in Belfast and Tony and Val are looking to relocate from London to County Down

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The 1966 World Cup Final - In Colour
programme.desc: England v West Germany. To raise awareness about Alzheimer's disease, David Baddiel introduces a full-colour restoration of the iconic showpiece match at Wembley Stadium. Alf Ramsey's hosts were looking to lift the trophy for the first time, but faced a tough test against the West Germans, and the match would go to extra time, with six goals being scored. With contributions from Geoff Hurst, Harry Kane, Michael Owen and Jill Scott

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones is joined by David Coulthard, Mark Webber and Lawrence Barretto to present action from the battle for grid positions in the sixth round of the campaign, held at Circuit de Monaco. McLaren's Lando Norris took pole position here last year, with Charles Leclerc of Ferrari joining him at the front of the grid

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody (2018)
programme.desc: Freddie Mercury and Queen go from playing small venues to becoming one of the biggest rock bands in the world. While Freddie comes to terms with his sexuality, outside forces threaten to tear the group apart, until their defining moment at Live Aid in July 1985. Oscar-winning biopic, starring Rami Malek, Lucy Boynton and Gwilym Lee

programme.title: BlackBerry (2023)
programme.desc: In 1996, engineering student Mike Lazaridis and best friend Douglas Fregin stand on the precipice of creating the world's first smartphone. However, a series of disastrous events paves the way for the gadget's eventual demise. Comedy, starring Jay Baruchel, Glenn Howerton and Matt Johnson

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: A pair of teenage schoolgirls ask Sam and his crew to make a movie about their favourite teacher, Miss Stanthorpe, who never got a chance to go to her own prom. The headmaster backs the project in a bid to look cool, hapless Sebastian spills food on his top - reverting to his childlike self and rejoining Year 8 - and the girls compete over who should play the young Miss Stanthorpe. Comedy from the mind of Sam Campbell, who stars alongside Lara Ricote, Aaron Chen and David Hargreaves

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Gurnsfield United are a bottom league team without a chance, but number one fan Ewin wants to see them win, if only on the big screen. programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

Sarah plans to transform the caravan into a beautiful living and sleeping space for when the family band is on tour. With only a few weeks until their first festival gig, the whole family pitch in to clean, gut and paint it, and then lay the new floor - a lino print inspired by a Persian rug

programme.title: Kevin Bridges: The Brand New Tour
programme.desc: A stand-up performance filmed as part of Kevin's 2018 UK and Ireland tour and his 19-night residency at the Glasgow Hydro. The comic gives his take on the modern world, social media, anxiety, religion, conversations with his dog and having Barack Obama as his support act

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Mac and CHEESE
programme.desc: Joey auditions for a major TV show about a man and his crime-fighting robot, but Chandler almost ruins everything. Featuring clips from earlier episodes, starring Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeth's Dad
programme.desc: Ross nervously prepares to meet Elizabeth's dad for the first time and Phoebe decides to write a book about Monica and Chandler. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Fake Party
programme.desc: Rachel spoils Ross's plans of a romantic last evening with Emily before she returns to England by organising a farewell party and inviting everyone. Meanwhile Phoebe's pregnancy causes her to abandon her vegetarian lifestyle as she craves meat. Comedy, guest starring Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Free Porn
programme.desc: Ross pours out his heart to Emily, but is unprepared for her reaction, while Phoebe receives surprising news about her pregnancy. Chandler and Joey get free adult films on their TV and try to make sure they do not disappear

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachel's New Dress
programme.desc: Rachel's date is ruined when Joshua's parents return home earlier than expected and catch her parading round in a skimpy nightie - which she then has to pretend is a new dress. Starring Jennifer Aniston and Tate Donovan

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Haste
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel plot to take back their old apartment from Chandler and Joey, and there are major changes afoot for lovebirds Ross and Emily. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Wedding Dresses
programme.desc: Chandler reaches the end of his tether over Joey's snoring and forces him to seek professional help, while Rachel has a drastic reaction to Ross's engagement. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross reminisces with Rachel about the good times they had when they were dating, as the invitations go out for his wedding. Meanwhile, the others work out whether they can attend the ceremony. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie (2016)
programme.desc: When a peaceful island is visited by mysterious green piggies, its up to Red, Bomb and Chuck, outcast flightless birds, to get to the bottom of the suspicious invaders. Animation, with the voices of Jason Sudeikis, Josh Gad, Danny McBride, Maya Rudolph and Bill Hader

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The duo's road trip continues as they arrive in Costa Rica, where Brad's fear of heights is tested as Barney arranges a flight in a tiny, roofless helicopter to take in some of Costa Rica's breathtaking coastal views. Later, the pair meet a quirky animal lover, before heading to the capital city of San Jose, where they join a local Roller Derby team for a match against their biggest rivals

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The duo continue to explore Costa Rica. Inspired by childhood memories, the pair head to the country's cloud forest, where they attempt tree climbing. They also visit a local sanctuary that is home to 2000 free roaming dogs, before heading into the countryside to meet a former Olympian in Kayak Slalom, where the father and son go head-to-head in a time trial

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Worst Best Man Ever
programme.desc: Joey somehow manages to lose Ross's wedding ring at the stag party, while Phoebe's pregnancy causes her to experience violent mood swings. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Ross's Wedding - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Rachel and a heavily pregnant Phoebe stay at home while Chandler, Joey and Monica go to England for Ross's wedding to Emily. Once there, however, it seems all Joey and Chandler can do is bicker. Guest starring Richard Branson and Sarah Ferguson

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Ross's Wedding - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As everyone makes their final preparations for Ross's wedding in London, Rachel tries to get a flight out to declare her love for him before he marries Emily. Guest starring Jennifer Saunders, Elliott Gould, Hugh Laurie and Tom Conti

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Ross Says Rachel
programme.desc: Despite Ross's massive blunder, he and Emily go through with the wedding - but she is clearly devastated and sneaks out of a window at the reception, declaring she never wants to see him again. Guest starring Helen Baxendale, Elliott Gould and Jennifer Saunders

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Kissing
programme.desc: Rachel returns from Greece and Chandler proves popular with the womenfolk. Phoebe feels upset about missing out on all the excitement in London, so the gang decides to treat her to a weekend in Atlantic City. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Surrogate mum Phoebe goes into labour and gives birth to triplets, but it proves harder than she anticipated to hand them over to her brother. Meanwhile, Joey experiences some pain of his own and Monica plans to spite Chandler by dating a male nurse

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Phoebe Hates PBS
programme.desc: Emily makes a request that could change Ross's life for ever, presenting him with a huge dilemma. Chandler upsets Monica by gloating about sex, while Joey challenges Phoebe to perform a completely selfless act. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross delivers devastating news to Rachel - he cannot spend time with her while Emily is in New York. Meanwhile, Joey discovers Chandler's secret romance. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Emily asks Ross to move away from his friends, while Monica and Rachel are understandably taken aback to meet a hairy man who they mistake for a yeti. American comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Moves In
programme.desc: Ross moves in with Chandler and Joey, but the transition does not go as smoothly as expected. Danny deals Rachel's ego a blow by introducing her to an exceptionally dull date, and Phoebe becomes disillusioned with the health inspector she is seeing

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Thanksgivings
programme.desc: The pals digest a huge Thanksgiving meal and reminisce about their worst holiday experiences, including the time Chandler's father left his mother in favour of the houseboy, and the occasion in 1987 when a teenage Monica overheard Chandler calling her fat. Guest starring Morgan Fairchild

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey tries to cover up Chandler and Monica's relationship - but only succeeds in making himself look stupid. Phoebe persuades Rachel to take a literature class with her, while Ross falls out with his co-workers, convinced one of them stole his prized sandwich

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the Saturday-night game show, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize. programme.title: Lee Evans - Monsters
programme.desc: The energetic stand-up star rails against the annoyances of modern life, in a performance recorded at the National Indoor Arena in Birmingham in 2014. programme.title: White Men Can't Jump (1992)

Ron Shelton's comedy, starring Woody Harrelson, Wesley Snipes and Rosie Perez

However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hordes of the creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 30-year-old woman Emmy-Lou from Brighton, who has appeared on the show twice before, both times in the pod. Now she is back as the picker, unaware she is in for a big surprise. She is followed by 20-year-old Charlie from Oxford, a forensics student who hopes to find his ideal partner in crime

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, critiquing The Outlaws, Family Fortunes, You, Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House and The Mating Game. They also offer their thoughts on ITV News of COP26 and other stories. Narrated by Craig Cash. From November 2021

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Reiki healer and animal communicator Jayne is set up on a date with 44-year-old children's entertainer Stuart. Meanwhile, headstrong parliamentary researcher Cecilia, who's 23, is looking for a man to match her drive and determination, and may have met her match when she meets straight-talking business development manager Viv. Student James, who has a prosthetic leg and has had his confidence knocked from dates in the past, is set up on a date with fellow student Emilie, who is making the brave move into the world of dating

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. This time, 22-year-old transgender woman Amira, and Andy, a rugby player from Coventry, take part

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray coaches Barry for his first high school wrestling match but keeps it a secret from Beverly, who is sure to disapprove of her son taking part in such a dangerous sport. Adam blackmails Erica into waiting in line with him to buy tickets for the new Stars Wars movie

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray gets his moment in the spotlight when he is honoured by his old high school for his basketball prowess. While he and Beverly are away from home, Barry takes advantage of their absence to throw a party to impress his school friends

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: More couples from some of the programme's most dramatic weddings look back on their big days. Rachel and Adam look back on their 1980s Aussie soap wedding, when Adam attempted to recreate the magical moment Jason Donovan married Kylie Minogue in Neighbours

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: The five remaining teams are each given a base plate representing a typical room in a house - from a kitchen to a bathroom and a bedroom - and have 10 hours to create minifigures living in the land of the giants. The holders of the Big Brick assign the rooms to the teams

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: It's the grand finale, and in Kuala Lumpur, the top three teams are put to the ultimate test using skills they've perfected during the race so far. They're tasked with recreating a dessert with help from a python, hunting for a treasure map in a bookstore, and making their way to the other side of the city by any means possible. The duos must also recall locations from the places they've raced through, before a pit stop finish like never before

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: As the retreat winds down, one couple make amends while others begin planning for the future. However, a serious roadblock forces one pair to confront deep issues and question whether their marriage can last the distance

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With Decision Day looming, the couples prepare for the biggest call of their lives, questioning love, trust and authenticity in the process. One wife is blindsided by life-changing news

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog (2020)
programme.desc: Sonic, a blue hedgehog who can run at supersonic speeds, is transported to Earth. A decade later, while enjoying life in Montana, his speedy skills create an electromagnetic pulse. Scientific genius Dr Robotnik is hired to investigate, and becomes obsessed with capturing the creature for his power. Live-action fantasy adventure based on the video games, starring James Marsden and Jim Carrey, with the voice of Ben Schwartz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa becomes insecure about her size after she and Bart contract a bizarre infection that requires treatment from steroids that cause temporary weight gain

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A teenage Homer embarks on a road trip in the company of Grampa to look for his mother

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Mr Burns fight for the soul of brash young football prodigy Grayson Mathers

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a union representative at the power plant and immediately uses his new-found authority to save the company's free dental plan and avoid having to pay for Lisa's new braces. Featuring the voice of Dr Joyce Brothers

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: So It's Come to This: A Simpsons Clip Show

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A particularly bad episode of Itchy & Scratchy prompts Bart and Lisa to write their own script and send it to the show's producer under Grampa's name. With the voice of Brooke Shields

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa tries to persuade her family not to take part in the town's annual snake-clubbing ritual, but her words fall on deaf ears as Homer anticipates the event with glee. With the guest voice of Barry White

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Long-standing TV personality Krusty the Clown reaches the end of the road, his days of entertaining kids quashed by an alternative show - prompting his famous friends to come to the rescue. Animation, with the voices of Elizabeth Taylor, Hugh Hefner, Bette Midler and the Red Hot Chili Peppers

programme.title: Moonfall (2022)
programme.desc: A mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit and sends the Earth's only natural satellite on a collision course with our planet. Astronauts Jocinda Fowler and Brian Harper, who served together on an ill-fated space mission, join forces with conspiracy theorist KC Houseman to avert catastrophe. Director Roland Emmerich's sci-fi thriller, starring Patrick Wilson, Halle Berry, John Bradley and Donald Sutherland in one of his final films

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics settle down with their takeaways to watch Bridgerton, The Apprentice, Secret Genius, The Floor, Pole to Pole with Will Smith and Olivia Attwood: Getting Filthy Rich, while the cameras capture their thoughts and instant reactions

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 27-year-old flight attendant Alex from Bristol. programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Voiceover artist Nick, 62, is set up on a date with 52-year-old golfer Laura, and 22-year-old Jordan, a boxer for Team Great Britain, meets 23-year-old Thai boxer Chloe. programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: History student Abbie is a descendant of Henry VIII but is hoping to find someone much nicer than her horrible ancestor. programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics settle down with their takeaways to watch Bridgerton, The Apprentice, Secret Genius, The Floor, Pole to Pole with Will Smith and Olivia Attwood: Getting Filthy Rich, while the cameras capture their thoughts and instant reactions

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Gladiators, The Summit, Michael McIntyre's Big Show, Bridgerton, Guy Martin's House Without Bills, Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly and BBC News, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: A cancer patient wants a commemorative tattoo, a Mexican has the sombrero design on his nipple removed, and a couple get matching tattoos before their wedding

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. The headline news from this episode is that Greg Davies almost gags after opening a large jar - and the competition remains as close as ever. After four episodes and four different winners, only Emma Sidi has yet to climb the steps and claim a bounty of prizes. Is this her time? We don't know yet. But it certainly is time for Andy Zaltzman to make a robot sing, and for a newly blond Jack Dee to discuss hedgehogs

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr, Sean Lock and Jon Richardson are joined by Bob Mortimer and Holly Walsh for more comic innuendos and unpredictable conundrums. Claudia Winkleman stands in for Rachel Riley on letters-and-numbers duty, while Isy Suttie is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent is in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Courtland Gray, the COO of audio equipment manufacturer Peavey Electronics, is poised to take over the Mississippi-based company when his stepfather, founder and CEO Hartley Peavey, is ready to hand over the reins. As he prepares to take full responsibility for the firm, Courtland dons a disguise to go incognito among the staff and find out how the frontline employees really feel

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Todd Pedersen, CEO and founder of Vivint, a leading solar and home security business, based in Utah, goes undercover among his own workforce posing as a contestant on a reality show. He's proud to head an organisation that provides a fun and relaxed work environment, but now that the company is offering smart home technology, it's in competition with much larger organisations, and Todd wants to make sure it's fully prepared to take them on

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Dippin' Dots is an American brand that sells cryogenically frozen beads of ice-cream. Recently, it enjoyed its busiest summer, scooping 146 billion dots and making an annual revenue of $300million. But, before that, in 2012, the company was on the brink of bankruptcy, until owner and CEO Scott Fischer turned its fortunes around. Here, he infiltrates his workforce to find out if his expanding empire has the manpower to cope. As his alter ego Brad, a man looking for a new career, he goes undercover, meeting a factory production operator, a warehouse supervisor, a sales supervisor and a server

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Things do not run smoothly for three Bournemouth couples, as one pair are late with their cooking, talk of butchering causes upset and a pescatarian is accidentally served meat

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Engaged duo Lee and Nicky begin the contest in Bristol with an Italian-themed menu, followed by Libby and Graham, who have been married for 54 years, and lively couple Nico and Sky

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Eccentric 27-year-old Chris plans every detail of his nuptials, and hopes to give his sensible fiancee Corraine a fairy-tale wedding to prove how much she means to him. However, the bride is concerned with the practicalities of being eight months pregnant on the big day, and without her grounding influence, the groom's wild ideas could spin out of control

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Space enthusiast Anthony is given full responsibility for organising his and fashion-conscious fiancee Holly's wedding, with a budget of £12,000 and a time constraint of three weeks. Holly's original plan to have an elegant Italian-style event hit the buffers, so Anthony is under more pressure than ever to provide something to please her

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Ashley and Brandon Wright, the co-owners of Hamburger Mary's, go incognito in their own company, hoping to ensure that their culture of diversity and acceptance is maintained as the business expands. Ashley goes undercover to appear with drag performer Jayla at a brunch show, and Brandon works a shift with bar manager Melissa, who feels underappreciated after eight years' of hard work

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Dan Duffy, the Chief Executive of United Real Estate Group, adopts a disguise to go undercover in his own company. Dan meets many different employees to learn about their professional standards and also their personal lives.

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Southbridge, Massachusetts, where he checks into the Vienna Inn, an Austrian-themed hotels and restaurant. Owners Jonathan and Lisa Krach have seen their cluttered inn acquire a negative reputation among the locals, and as a result, business isn't what it used to be. Can Gordon turn things round and keep the doors to this historic hotel open?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Harpers Ferry in West Virginia, where he tries to save the Town's Inn, a historic hotel run by retired teacher and junk hoarder Karan Townsend. She has accumulated so many useless belongings that there is hardly any room to accommodate guests. Can Gordon convince her to get rid of her clutter or will the hotel continue to go down the pan?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers hope auctions in the California college town of Rancho Dominguez will land them big money. Mary decides to explore her mean side, while Darrell and Brandon look for more bargains

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers struggle in Santa Ana and head to an auction in Hawaiian Gardens looking for more success. Mary tries to stay within budget and new competition arrives

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

On the last night, retired businessmen Adrian and Mark's well thought-out menu and unusual entertainment bring everything to a lively conclusion

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Ben, a 30-year-old from Wales, hopes the £12,000 he has at his disposal will provide his controlling fiancee Sarah with the wedding of her dreams. However, her desire to get married abroad and his mother's reluctance to trust his decisions threaten his chances of success

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Brick Hotel in Newtown, Pennsylvania, where the staff have had enough of owner Verindar, who runs the establishment like an angry tyrant. Can Gordon convince her to value her loyal workers and entice customers back to this landmark hotel?

programme.sub-title: In the Name of the Grandfather
programme.desc: After ducking out of a bonding session with Grampa, a guilt-ridden Homer vows to make it up to his father by granting him a wish. The old man decides to visit Ireland and drop in on his favourite pub from his army days. Upon arrival, the pair discover the bar is a shadow of its former self, and agree to buy the business and turn its fortunes around

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer proposes to Marge for the second time when he discovers their marriage licence is invalid, but the ceremony does not proceed without a hitch. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta and Julie Kavner

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct goes into lockdown on Thanksgiving when a mysterious powder-filled package is delivered to the building. Peralta, who has been left in charge while Holt and Jeffords are out of the office, is confident he can keep morale high and avoid any chaos - but things soon spiral out of control

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While attempting to catch a drug dealer, Peralta and Boyle reluctantly join forces with Agent Jack Danger, a pompous investigator at the US Postal Inspection Service. Meanwhile, the other officers try to help Santiago conquer her cravings and give up smoking

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A small lie spirals out of control for Phil when he tries to hide the fact he has an attractive new client from Claire, who is keeps her handsome yoga teacher. Elsewhere, Jay becomes obsessed with tracking down a troll who's been leaving nasty comments about his web show, and Mitch and Cam try to teach a nervous Lily to ride a bicycle

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron's emotional sister Pam proves too much for Mitchell when she comes to visit, while Phil and Claire struggle to stay awake during a spontaneous trip to Paris. Jay's bathroom remodeling project frustrates Gloria, and Andy has a wild night out in Las Vegas with Haley

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and the kids cause havoc as they desperately try to hide a stray dog from Phil, while Jay finds himself in a pickle when Gloria tries to make friends with another couple and Cameron rents out his upstairs apartment to a rock band

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: With their prom just around the corner, Luke and Manny find themselves with big decisions to make about who to ask, but their situation is made all the more nerve-wrecking when Cam and Mitch decide to interfere. Meanwhile, Phil and Gloria confront a competitor about stealing a hot sauce recipe and Claire grows concerned that she has a mole in her company

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The proud residents of Springfield are outraged when they learn their town anthem was stolen from a travelling musician, so Bart and Lisa volunteer to find a replacement song. Meanwhile, Homer is on a mission to find a fat people's rights group after a humiliating incident in which he gets stuck in his seat. With the guest voice of Pharrell Williams

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is told to entertain a visiting Nigerian princess whose father is in town for a business meeting with Mr Burns, but when she proves uninterested in the TV, he takes her to Moe's, where she and the normally irascible barman strike a surprisingly sweet friendship. With the guest voices of Jon Lovitz and Richard Branson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Chief Wiggum gets his hands on a military jet pack, only to cause insurmountable damage to the local church. To make matters worse, Marge and the rest of the congregation are short of funds to repair their beloved place of worship - so they resort to gambling to raise the necessary funds

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is convinced Bart is lying when he denies any responsibility for a bulldozer crash, so she doggedly follows her mischief-making son's every step in the hope he will eventually crumble and confess. Meanwhile, it's a case of out with the old and in with the new when Homer gives Santa's Little Helper the cold shoulder in favour of Flanders' new pooch

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Ziff Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly takes the blame for his former love rival Artie Ziff's shady financial dealings and business irregularities. Arrested and put on trial, he is shocked to find himself sentenced to 10 years in prison. With the guest voice of Jon Lovitz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Long-standing TV personality Krusty the Clown reaches the end of the road, his days of entertaining kids quashed by an alternative show - prompting his famous friends to come to the rescue. Animation, with the voices of Elizabeth Taylor, Hugh Hefner, Bette Midler and the Red Hot Chili Peppers

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A parliamentary assistant fears talking politics scares men away, but may have met her match in an outspoken journalist. A 69-year-old former roadie is looking for someone to settle down with after surviving cancer, while a Lithuanian spa therapist searches for an older man who she can start a family with

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hordes of the creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. This time, 22-year-old transgender woman Amira, and Andy, a rugby player from Coventry, take part

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Voiceover artist Nick, 62, is set up on a date with 52-year-old golfer Laura, and 22-year-old Jordan, a boxer for Team Great Britain, meets 23-year-old Thai boxer Chloe. Elsewhere, telecoms analyst Ketan, who has high-functioning autism and has been reluctant to reveal it to any potential partner, goes on a date with Brodie

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, critiquing The Outlaws, Family Fortunes, You, Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House and The Mating Game. They also offer their thoughts on ITV News of COP26 and other stories. Narrated by Craig Cash. From November 2021

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Reiki healer and animal communicator Jayne is set up on a date with 44-year-old children's entertainer Stuart. Meanwhile, headstrong parliamentary researcher Cecilia, who's 23, is looking for a man to match her drive and determination, and may have met her match when she meets straight-talking business development manager Viv. Student James, who has a prosthetic leg and has had his confidence knocked from dates in the past, is set up on a date with fellow student Emilie, who is making the brave move into the world of dating

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. This time, 22-year-old transgender woman Amira, and Andy, a rugby player from Coventry, take part

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray coaches Barry for his first high school wrestling match but keeps it a secret from Beverly, who is sure to disapprove of her son taking part in such a dangerous sport. Adam blackmails Erica into waiting in line with him to buy tickets for the new Stars Wars movie

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray gets his moment in the spotlight when he is honoured by his old high school for his basketball prowess. While he and Beverly are away from home, Barry takes advantage of their absence to throw a party to impress his school friends

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: More couples from some of the programme's most dramatic weddings look back on their big days. Rachel and Adam look back on their 1980s Aussie soap wedding, when Adam attempted to recreate the magical moment Jason Donovan married Kylie Minogue in Neighbours

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: The five remaining teams are each given a base plate representing a typical room in a house - from a kitchen to a bathroom and a bedroom - and have 10 hours to create minifigures living in the land of the giants. The holders of the Big Brick assign the rooms to the teams

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Featuring a variety of cats doing strange things, soldiers stuck in the sand and a dog balancing on a rope

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: It's the grand finale, and in Kuala Lumpur, the top three teams are put to the ultimate test using skills they've perfected during the race so far. They're tasked with recreating a dessert with help from a python, hunting for a treasure map in a bookstore, and making their way to the other side of the city by any means possible. The duos must also recall locations from the places they've raced through, before a pit stop finish like never before

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: As the retreat winds down, one couple make amends while others begin planning for the future. However, a serious roadblock forces one pair to confront deep issues and question whether their marriage can last the distance

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With Decision Day looming, the couples prepare for the biggest call of their lives, questioning love, trust and authenticity in the process. One wife is blindsided by life-changing news

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog (2020)
programme.desc: Sonic, a blue hedgehog who can run at supersonic speeds, is transported to Earth. A decade later, while enjoying life in Montana, his speedy skills create an electromagnetic pulse. Scientific genius Dr Robotnik is hired to investigate, and becomes obsessed with capturing the creature for his power. Live-action fantasy adventure based on the video games, starring James Marsden and Jim Carrey, with the voice of Ben Schwartz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa becomes insecure about her size after she and Bart contract a bizarre infection that requires treatment from steroids that cause temporary weight gain

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Portrait of a Lackey on Fire
programme.desc: Homer offers to play matchmaker for Smithers and introduces him to jetsetting fashion designer mogul Michael de Graaf

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A teenage Homer embarks on a road trip in the company of Grampa to look for his mother

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge select Fat Tony to be Maggie's godfather, but are worried about his influence on her

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Mr Burns fight for the soul of brash young football prodigy Grayson Mathers

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a union representative at the power plant and immediately uses his new-found authority to save the company's free dental plan and avoid having to pay for Lisa's new braces. Featuring the voice of Dr Joyce Brothers

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: So It's Come to This: A Simpsons Clip Show
programme.desc: Bart's latest prank wrecks the house and lands Homer in hospital, where he and the family reminisce about all the other injuries and mishaps he has suffered in his eventful and disaster-filled life

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A particularly bad episode of Itchy & Scratchy prompts Bart and Lisa to write their own script and send it to the show's producer under Grampa's name. With the voice of Brooke Shields

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa tries to persuade her family not to take part in the town's annual snake-clubbing ritual, but her words fall on deaf ears as Homer anticipates the event with glee. With the guest voice of Barry White

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Long-standing TV personality Krusty the Clown reaches the end of the road, his days of entertaining kids quashed by an alternative show - prompting his famous friends to come to the rescue. Animation, with the voices of Elizabeth Taylor, Hugh Hefner, Bette Midler and the Red Hot Chili Peppers

programme.title: Moonfall (2022)
programme.desc: A mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit and sends the Earth's only natural satellite on a collision course with our planet. Astronauts Jocinda Fowler and Brian Harper, who served together on an ill-fated space mission, join forces with conspiracy theorist KC Houseman to avert catastrophe. Director Roland Emmerich's sci-fi thriller, starring Patrick Wilson, Halle Berry, John Bradley and Donald Sutherland in one of his final films

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal and his mother Linda, Denise van Outen and her boyfriend Eddie Boxshall, Kelly Osbourne and her friend Sammy Barratt-Singh, Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr, Stanley Johnson and Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Laurence and Emilia Fox, Nicole Appleton and Mel Blatt, Gyles Brandreth and Sheila Hancock, Little Mix, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford, Martin and Roman Kemp, Rachel Riley and Pasha Kovalev, Jamie and Rebekah Vardy, and Jessie J and Jamal Edwards become TV critics. Shows under their scrutiny include Countdown, Love Island, Antiques Roadshow, Naked Attraction, It, My Gay Dog And Other Animals, and Killing Eve. From June 2019

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics settle down with their takeaways to watch Bridgerton, The Apprentice, Secret Genius, The Floor, Pole to Pole with Will Smith and Olivia Attwood: Getting Filthy Rich, while the cameras capture their thoughts and instant reactions

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Gladiators, The Summit, Michael McIntyre's Big Show, Bridgerton, Guy Martin's House Without Bills, Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly and BBC News, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, focusing their attentions on Sitting on a Fortune, Close to Me, You, Nadiya's Fast Flavours, Animal, UFO Witness, This Morning's Spin to Win feature and the ITV News. Narrated by Craig Cash. From November 2021

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: History student Abbie is a descendant of Henry VIII but is hoping to find someone much nicer than her horrible ancestor. Butler Kit wants to meet a man who shares his passion for the royal family, and will football-mad James get the royal seal of approval from Kate Middleton lookalike Jodie?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics settle down with their takeaways to watch Bridgerton, The Apprentice, Secret Genius, The Floor, Pole to Pole with Will Smith and Olivia Attwood: Getting Filthy Rich, while the cameras capture their thoughts and instant reactions

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Gladiators, The Summit, Michael McIntyre's Big Show, Bridgerton, Guy Martin's House Without Bills, Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly and BBC News, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 30-year-old woman Emmy-Lou from Brighton, who has appeared on the show twice before, both times in the pod. Now she is back as the picker, unaware she is in for a big surprise. She is followed by 20-year-old Charlie from Oxford, a forensics student who hopes to find his ideal partner in crime

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The sofa-critics watch The Crown, I'm a Celebrity? Get Me Out Of Here!, You Won't Believe This, Down to Earth with Zac Efron, This Morning with Marie Kondo, The Hidden Lives of Pets, and ITV News and the World Cup

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It has been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry hosts a 'no parents allowed' birthday party for Adam, instead of the laser tag party that was originally planned. He hopes to help his little brother get his first kiss with Dana, but his action sparks some surprisingly protective instincts in Erica. Comedy, starring Troy Gentile and Sean Giambrone

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Erica's boyfriend dumps her, Beverly finds a handsome new date to take her daughter to a party. Meanwhile, Barry becomes addicted to an arcade video game and will stop at nothing to get the money to play it

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: High school lovebirds Maria and Ryan, his best man Tavis and Maria's sister Veronica are together again on camera for the first time since their school-themed wedding in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Tired of the family's obsession with electronic gadgets, Claire and Phil declare a household challenge to see who can stay unplugged the longest. Mitch and Cameron frantically try to get Lily into the best pre-school, while Jay and Manny are concerned at the lengths to which Gloria will go to stop the neighbour's dog barking

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire prepares the Dunphy household for Halloween, but the rest of the family is less enthusiastic. The spooky goings-on remind Cameron of a traumatic childhood experience, and Gloria is upset when Jay and Manny make fun of her accent

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first night in Ashford, Kent, francophiles Stephanie and Ian kick of the competition by serving French food from a home emulating the Palace of Versailles. The second night sees city slickers Louise and Dan attempt to secure their lead with spreadsheet organisation, before fun-loving couple Pippa and Lee make a bid for the prize with a mixture of fancy dress, stripping off, wacky voices and homely food

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It has been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay switches sides after joining Cam's bowling team, while Phil and Claire see a different side to their neighbours. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Bad moods must be catching when Phil and Jay spend the afternoon together. Meanwhile, Gloria teaches Haley how to stand up to her boss. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders buys the Simpsons' home when they are unable to pay their mortgage and rents it back to them at an affordable rate, but Homer soon takes advantage of his new landlord's generosity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa has to go undercover as a nun and infiltrate a convent when Maggie goes missing after being left on its doorstep. Meanwhile, Marge is left temporarily blind when she stares at a total eclipse, so Homer has to sort out their rat-infested kitchen

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals

Plus, Sicilian-inspired meatballs and tomato 'Norma' sauce and a twist on beans on toast with broad beans and peas from the freezer. The chef also demonstrates how to reap the benefits of a well-stocked store cupboard

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals

programme.title: James Martin's Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by chef Galton Blackiston for a tour of Cornwall. The trip concludes with a visit to Sennen beach, where they practice their oil painting and break out the barbecue

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Everyday Kitchen

programme.desc: A murder case launched after police found burnt remains in an abandoned mining pit in the small town of Hibbing, Minnesota. However, before investigations could gain traction, officers needed to first identity the body

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: How a lively slumber party in the town of McMinnville turned into a nightmare when a loving mother, her young daughter, and her daughter's friend, were murdered

programme.title: Homicide City
programme.desc: The case of Philadelphia restaurant manger John Thurberg, who was murdered at work in May 1996. The motive behind the crime was unclear, but when police interviewed his employees, they uncovered a web of secrets and lies

programme.title: Homicide City
programme.desc: A case that began when a woman was found dead in her bath. Initially, it was thought she had died of natural causes, but an autopsy revealed she had been strangled

programme.title: Homicide City
programme.desc: A case in which a hardworking mum was shot dead on a roadside in 2005. Police worked tirelessly to catch the killer, fearing a murderer was on the loose

programme.title: Homicide City
programme.desc: When a DJ was found brutally murdered outside a radio station, police originally believed it was a robbery gone wrong. The facts later revealed he was not just a random victim

programme.title: American Monster: Abuse of Power
programme.sub-title: I Deserve to Live, They Don't
programme.desc: Millionaire CEO Kim Bailey suspects her employees are stealing from her. When a colleague vanishes, an FBI investigation leads to a deadly conclusion

programme.title: American Monster: Abuse of Power
programme.desc: When a medical board strikes off Arkansas pain doctor Randeep Mann amid accusations about his practice, he launches a volatile plot to regain power

programme.title: American Monster: Abuse of Power
programme.desc: A respected police Lieutenant, Billy Fields, fails to solve the murder of a young mother. Years later, the reason why becomes shockingly clear

programme.title: American Monster: Abuse of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Schirmer is a local celebrity beloved by his community. However, as investigators examine the deaths of his previous wives, a monster emerges

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town
programme.sub-title: Roses Are Red, Murder Is Too
programme.desc: The death of a town council member. Local residents were appalled - especially when the evidence began to suggest a professional 'hit' had taken place

programme.title: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: The murder of 31-year-old single mother Amy Theriault, who was shot and stabbed by boyfriend Jesse Marquis in her home after she tried to end the relationship

programme.title: Seduced to Slay
programme.desc: A couple on a murderous crime spree leaves a bloody trail, from Speedway, Indiana, to Texas. Police race to catch them before they strike again

programme.title: Fatal Affairs
programme.desc: When a new girl arrives in town, she attracts the local, married heartthrob. When they embark on an affair, it leads to mayhem and murder

programme.title: A Body in the Basement
programme.desc: A body found in a California basement opens a decades-old mystery. As police investigate, they learn it belongs to a teenager missing since 1984

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: The 2008 murder of Paul Grainger and subsequent convictions for the crime of his wife Nancy, his daughter Brandi Lea, and two accomplices, Dylan Boston and Phillip Mabe. Plus, the story of Crystal Howell, tried for shooting her father in 2014

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: A shooting in a luxury building sends shockwaves through an upscale neighbourhood. Detectives uncover a list of suspects and a plot born out of economic envy.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: Workouts turn a group of fitness fanatics into bitter rivals. As the competition heats up, it's not just buff bodies and tight abs on the line

programme.title: The Lies That Bind
programme.desc: The case of Paula Allen, who died when a fire burned down a parsonage behind a church. Upon investigation, a fire marshal discovers the blaze was no accident

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. programme.title: The Fighter (2010)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about boxer Micky Ward. He is initially trained by his brother, a former fighter who lost everything through drug addiction. Micky is persuaded to sever ties with his family after a series of disastrous fights, but when a shot at the world championship title presents itself, the brothers must reconcile to meet the challenge. With Mark Wahlberg, Amy Adams and Oscar-winning performances from Christian Bale and Melissa Leo

programme.title: Reprisal (2018)
programme.desc: A bank manager teams up with his ex-cop neighbour to hunt down the thieves who killed a friend in a botched heist. Action thriller, starring Frank Grillo, Bruce Willis and Johnathon Schaech

programme.title: Red (2008)
programme.desc: Elderly, reclusive widower Avery Ludlow is left distraught when his only companion in life - a 14-year-old dog named Red - is murdered by three teenagers. After tracking the youths down, Avery demands the parents take action against the youths but after being turned away, he decides to dish out justice by any means necessary. Thriller, starring Brian Cox, Noel Fisher, Tom Sizemore and Kyle Gallner
